title: FileSystemTool
description: Read-only file system access tool with path whitelisting. No write operations are permitted.

description.const: Provides read-only access to whitelisted file system paths. Cannot write, delete, move, or create files or directories.

allowed_operations.description: Exhaustive list of permitted operations. No other operations are available.

path_restrictions.description: Access control constraints applied to all operations.

whitelisted_paths.description: Only paths under these prefixes may be accessed.

write_operations_permitted.description: Write operations are never permitted. Any attempt raises NotImplementedError.

path_traversal_protection.description: All paths are resolved via Path.resolve() before whitelist comparison, preventing ../ traversal attacks.

max_file_size_bytes.description: Maximum file size (4 MB) that read_file will return. Larger files raise ValueError.

max_list_entries.description: Maximum number of entries list_directory will return.

max_search_results.description: Maximum number of file paths search_files will return.

operations.description: Schema definitions for each allowed operation.

read_file.description: Read and return the content of a whitelisted file.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read.

list_directory.description: List immediate contents of a whitelisted directory.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the directory to list.

output.description: Entry names. Directories are suffixed with '/'.

search_files.description: Search for files matching a glob pattern within a whitelisted directory.

pattern.description: Relative glob pattern (e.g. '*.yaml', '**/*.md'). Must not be an absolute path.

directory.description: Root directory for the glob search. Must be whitelisted.

output.description: Absolute paths of matching files, sorted lexicographically.
